name: hermes-skills-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugin face of the Hermes skills hub. Hosts plan-review (the closed-loop ExitPlanMode gate + /investigate-plan adapter + /waive-investigation) alongside the repo's Hermes-native skills. Hermes reads .well-known/skills + skills/; Claude Code reads this manifest + plugins/.

plugins.name: plan-review
plugins.description: Closed-loop plan-review gate on ExitPlanMode: Codex unknowns audit + agentic-investigation gate, /investigate-plan, /waive-investigation.
